title: Escalation Decision Result
description: Platform-level schema for an escalation decision result within the PDP Decision Envelope. See docs/escalation-decision.md for full semantics and trigger conditions.

escalate.description: Whether escalation to a higher authority is needed. When false, other fields may be omitted.

reason.description: Reason for escalation. Should correspond to a platform trigger condition or a custom reason.

target_authority.description: Target authority for escalation. Recommended values: 'main_agent', 'human_reviewer'.

triggering_condition.description: Identifier of the specific condition that triggered escalation.

context_summary.description: Context summary to pass to the escalation target.

suggested_action.description: Suggested action for the escalation target to take.
